---
title: "Genotyping QC pre-Imputation"
author: "Darren Cameron"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
params:
  in_dir: null
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(stringr)
library(DT)
in_dir <- params$in_dir
```

## QC tables {.tabset}

***

### QC 3: Sex ambiguity

***

```{r sex_summary, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
sex_tbl <- system(paste0("cat ", in_dir, "eqtl_genotypes_hg19.qc3.sexcheck"), intern = TRUE) %>%
  read_delim(col_types = cols(), file = I(.))

datatable(sex_tbl, caption = 'Table 3. Sex ambiguities') 
```

***

### QC 4: Kinship 

***

```{r kinship_summary, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
kinship_tbl <- system(paste0("cat ", in_dir, "eqtl_genotypes_hg19.qc4.pcrelate.kin"), intern = TRUE) %>%
  read_delim(col_types = cols(), file = I(.))

datatable(kinship_tbl, caption = 'Table 4. Related samples') 
```

***

cat ../results/04GENOTYPES/GenotypeQCtoHRC/eqtlgenotypeshg38pretm/


### QC 5: Ancestry 

***

```{r ancestry_summary, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
ancestry_tbl <- system(paste0("cat ", in_dir, "eqtl_genotypes_hg19.qc5.ancestry_inference.txt | cut -f 1-9"), intern = TRUE) %>%
  read_delim(col_types = cols(), file = I(.))

datatable(ancestry_tbl, caption = 'Table 5. Ancestry prediction per sample') 
```

***
